stack:up.description: Bring the synthetic dev stack up. M0 supports the --dry-run closure planner only.

porcelain.description: machine-readable output; no color, minimal noise
porcelain.name: porcelain

output-json.description: emit structured JSON on stdout instead of human-readable text
output-json.name: output-json

dev.description: sibling-repo workspace root (where the saga repos are checked out)
dev.name: dev

state-dir.description: scratch dir for pid files, snapshots, and other run state
state-dir.name: state-dir

soa.description: override path to the soa repo checkout
soa.name: soa

rostering.description: override path to the rostering repo checkout
rostering.name: rostering

program-hub.description: override path to the program-hub repo checkout
program-hub.name: program-hub

saga-dash.description: override path to the saga-dash repo checkout
saga-dash.name: saga-dash

sds.description: override path to the sds (student-data-system) repo checkout
sds.name: sds

qboard.description: override path to the qboard repo checkout
qboard.name: qboard

rtsm.description: override path to the rtsm repo checkout
rtsm.name: rtsm

fleek.description: override path to the fleek repo checkout
fleek.name: fleek

only.description: comma-separated services to bring up; closure pulls in their dependencies
only.name: only

with-playback.description: include the optional playback services (transcripts, insights, chat)
with-playback.name: with-playback

dry-run.description: plan only: print the resolved closure and exit without touching docker/pnpm
dry-run.name: dry-run
